mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repair_expert WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY work_years DESC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM repair_expert
AND expert_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{expertName}, '%')
AND specialty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specialty}, '%')
ORDER BY status DESC, work_years DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_expert
AND expert_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{expertName}, '%')
AND specialty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specialty}, '%')
SELECT * FROM repair_expert WHERE expert_name = #{expertName} LIMIT 1
SELECT CONCAT('EXP', LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(expert_code, 4) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 5, '0')) FROM repair_expert WHERE expert_code REGEXP '^EXP[0-9]+$'
